list.title: Invoices
list.description: Fiscal receipts (CFDI) issued by this venue.
list.emptyHint: Invoices will appear here once they are issued to your customers.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel invoice
cancelDialog.description: Select the cancellation reason for the SAT. This action cannot be undone.
cancelDialog.motivo01: 01 - Invoice issued with errors, with relation
cancelDialog.motivo02: 02 - Invoice issued with errors, without relation
cancelDialog.motivo03: 03 - The operation did not take place
cancelDialog.motivo04: 04 - Nominative operation related in a global invoice
cancelDialog.substituteUuidPlaceholder: UUID of the CFDI that substitutes this one
cancelDialog.substituteUuidHint: Required by the SAT when the reason is 01.

config.title: Invoicing settings
config.description: Set up your fiscal data, certificates (CSD) and which merchants issue invoices.

emisores.title: Issuers
emisores.description: The RFCs you issue invoices with.
emisores.empty: You haven't registered an issuer yet.

csdDialog.title: Upload certificate (CSD)
csdDialog.description: Upload your Digital Seal Certificate (.cer and .key) and the key password.

merchants.title: Merchants
merchants.description: Define which accounts and channels generate invoices and how.
merchants.empty: No merchants configured for invoicing yet.

toast.provisionError: Could not connect to the PAC.
toast.merchantSaveError: Could not save the merchant configuration.
